service.description: Name of the service that was used.

serviceUnit.description: Unit of measurement for the service (e.g., GB, hours, requests).

participantName.description: Name of the participant who used the service.

currency.description: Currency of the amounts (USD, EUR, RUB, etc).

metadata.description: Additional metadata associated with the usage record.

id.description: Unique identifier of the discount category

valueDiscount.description: Discount percentage value for this category

created.description: Date and time when the discount category was created

date.description: Date when the credit was applied.

transactionId.description: Unique identifier of the associated transaction.

quantity.description: Quantity of service units involved in the operation.

correspondingAccount.description: The corresponding account number for this operation.

timeUnit.description: Time unit for recurring operations (Day, Month, Year, etc).

startRecurringPeriod.description: Start date of the recurring period (if applicable).

endRecurringPeriod.description: End date of the recurring period (if applicable).

type.description: Type of operation (Debit, Credit, Reversal, etc).

typeStr.description: String representation of the operation type.

status.description: Current status of the operation (Pending, Completed, Failed, etc).

metadata.description: Additional metadata associated with the operation.

transactionDescription.description: Optional description or note about the transaction.

OperationDetalization.description: Response DTO providing detailed information about an operation and its related transaction.

date.description: Date and time when the operation occurred

accountNumber1.description: First account number in the transaction

accountNumber2.description: Second account number in the transaction

timeUnit.description: Time unit for the operation period

endRecurringPeriod.description: End date of the recurring period

countOrder.description: Number of orders included in this accrual

operationLogId.description: Unique identifier of the operation log
